item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Brændende kærlighed, a Danish comfort classic with crisp bacon and onions oversilky mashed potatoes, topped with chopped chives, cress and parsley. Pickled beetroot and wholegrain mustard on the side (6+11+13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Greek lemon and pepper chicken with roasted potatoes and slow baked tomatoes,topped with pea shoots. Greek carrot salad with salad cheese and agave lemonbalsamic glaze on the side (6+13+15) GREEN DISH: dish Greek lemon and pepper portobello with roasted potatoes and slow bakedtomatoes, topped with pea shoots. Greek carrot salad with salad cheese andagave lemon balsamic glaze on the side

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Oven baked saithe served with creamy mussel sauce and salt baked celeriac,topped with chopped parsley and crisp breadcrumbs (3+10+14+15) GREEN DISH: dish Breaded and pan fried tempeh with fresh salsa verde and salt baked celeriac,topped with chopped parsley and crisp breadcrumbs (1+10+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Thit kho, a Vietnamese everyday classic with caramelised pork, coconut andfresh greens, served with fragrant jasmine rice (7+8+15) GREEN DISH: dish Thit kho in a green interpretation with caramelised tofu, coconut and freshgreens, served with jasmine rice

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Creamy penne pasta, also available as whole grain and gluten free, tossed withpesto, peppers and onions, topped with Italian roasted chicken and a rustictomato and basil salad. Fennel crudité with herbs, lemon and chili sauce on theside (1+6+13+15) GREEN DISH: Creamy penne pasta, also available as whole grain and gluten free, tossed withpesto, peppers and onions, topped with Italian roasted oyster mushrooms and arustic tomato and basil salad. Fennel crudité with herbs, lemon and chili sauceon the side
